cards.title: Sketch onboarding flow
cards.description: Map the three-screen welcome sequence and the empty-state copy a first-time user sees.

cards.title: Audit color contrast
cards.description: Run every text and surface pairing through a WCAG AA check and log the failures.

cards.title: Draft weekly changelog
cards.description: Summarize shipped work in plain language for the Friday subscriber email.

cards.title: Wire persistence route
cards.description: Connect the board to the JSON file API so a reload restores the last saved state.

cards.title: Tune card hover states
cards.description: Add the lift shadow and border accent without introducing layout shift.

cards.title: Set up keyboard focus rings
cards.description: Make every interactive control reachable and visible when tabbing through the board.

cards.title: Name the columns
cards.description: Settle on Backlog, In Progress, and Done after reviewing three naming options.

cards.title: Pick the accent palette
cards.description: Lock the indigo and amber pairing and record the hex values in the design tokens.
